overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through Night City's neon-lit streets at night. The player navigates from dense urban commercial areas with holographic billboards through intersections and onto elevated highways, showcasing ray-traced neon reflections on wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with holographic advertisements

events.description: accelerating from stop through wet streets
passing blue sedan on the right side

agents.ego_description: driving through dense neon-lit city streets, navigating moderate traffic in the Kabuki district

notable_agents.action: blue sedan driving in adjacent lane, moving same direction

entered.detail: large red neon sign with 'KABUKI' text mounted on building facade
glowing green holographic advertisement floating above street level
orange safety railings along elevated walkway or bridge structure
rain-slicked asphalt reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings
tall futuristic glass tower with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: Driving through the dense Kabuki district with towering neon signs and holographic advertisements reflecting off wet asphalt. The camera passes a blue sedan while navigating the narrow commercial street lined with orange railings and cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with zebra crossings and holographic billboards

events.description: stopping at red traffic light at major intersection
turning right at intersection onto new street

agents.ego_description: navigating through city intersections, stopping at traffic signals and executing turns

notable_agents.action: red vehicle stopped at traffic light ahead of ego vehicle

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on road surface
traffic signal showing red light suspended over intersection
large floating holographic advertisement with changing imagery
tall vertical pink neon sign on building facade

segments.scene_description: Navigating a major intersection with zebra crossings and traffic signals. The vehicle stops at a red light surrounded by massive holographic billboards and pink neon signage before turning right, leaving the Kabuki sign behind while the glass tower recedes to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway entrance ramp with concrete overpasses

events.description: transitioning from city streets to highway entrance ramp
moving from bright neon-lit street to darker highway underpass area

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto highway ramp, transitioning from dense urban streets to elevated highway infrastructure

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving ahead on the highway ramp

entered.detail: curved entrance ramp leading to elevated highway with merge markings
massive concrete highway overpass structure with support pillars
tall palm trees visible on hillside beside highway
metal safety guardrail along highway edge

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the dense neon downtown onto a highway entrance ramp. The environment shifts from open commercial streets to a semi-covered concrete overpass structure with metal guardrails, palm trees visible on the periphery, and a yellow taxi ahead on the ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with concrete barriers and distant skyline

events.description: merging into highway traffic and accelerating
overtaking yellow taxi on the right side

agents.ego_description: cruising on elevated highway, navigating curves and passing other vehicles under overpasses

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi being overtaken on the right, moving slower than ego

entered.detail: elevated highway structure passing overhead with support columns
multi-lane elevated highway with lane markings and reflective studs
tall modern street lights illuminating the highway
tall dark skyscraper silhouette visible against night sky

segments.scene_description: Cruising along the elevated highway with concrete barriers and tall street lights. The vehicle overtakes a yellow taxi while passing under massive overpass structures, with the dense neon downtown now behind and only distant skyscrapers visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from the claustrophobic, neon-drenched streets of a commercial district to the open expanse of an elevated highway. It begins by weaving through the dense Kabuki district, where towering holographic advertisements and blue sedans are mirrored in the wet asphalt. As the vehicle reaches a major intersection, the camera pauses briefly under massive pink signage before turning right, causing the glass towers and district markers to recede. The scene then shifts from the open urban grid onto a concrete entrance ramp, where the environment narrows into a semi-covered overpass flanked by metal guardrails and peripheral palm trees. Finally, the camera accelerates along the elevated highway, overtaking a yellow taxi and passing under heavy concrete structures as the dense neon glow of downtown fades into a distant skyline of skyscrapers.
